title: jacquemontia havanensis
intro: Jacquemontia havanensis, also known as the West Indian nightshade or San Nicolás, is a flowering plant native to the Caribbean and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Jacquemontia havanensis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from pain and itching. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
